title: Aliases
description: Displays username history for a player through a server-side command.
body:
# Aliases [![Fabric Mod](https://img.shields.io/badge/modloader-fabric-informational)](https://fabricmc.net/use/) ![server](https://img.shields.io/badge/environment-server-orangered) [![Curseforge Download](https://cf.way2muchnoise.eu/full_581397_downloads.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aliases/files/all) [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/aliases?label=modrinth&logo=modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/mod/aliases/versions) [![Discord Server](https://img.shields.io/discord/385375030755983372.svg?label=discord)](https://discord.gg/UPKuVWgU4G)

Displays username history for a player through a server-side command.

![Demo Gif](https://i.imgur.com/aDjlOuz.gif)

## Permissions 
You have the option to use any permissions manager which implements the unofficial [fabric permissions API](https://github.com/lucko/fabric-permissions-api) (such as [LuckPerms](https://modrinth.com/mod/luckperms)) to control access to the */aliases* command through the `aliases.use` permission (granted by default).
